subject: (no subject)
body:
greg////  the proposal makes no sense... it doesn't
include a scope of work... it doesn't break out all
costs.. it doesn't include room and board ir even an
estimate...  GAbriel should come tto he isalnd and
spend two days with margie,, explain to her what he
wants and lets see if something happens... the koi
pond by my bedroom was supposed to be first and with a
cost,,, I would like to work woth you however I need a
docl proposal, electrrical.. watering hole for birds
proposal... as of today .l.. almost threee months
after signing a contract,,, i have yet to see
anything,  except a book of birds...    please provide
me a schedule as to when I will be recieving all the
things you are working on... 

__________________________________________________
